functions.name: vf1.looks_like_url
documentation: Cheap and cheerful URL detector

functions.name: vf1.needs_gi
documentation: Decorators

functions.name: vf1._find_first
documentation: Config file finding/creating

functions.name: vf1.main
documentation: Main function

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient._go_to_gi
documentation:
This method might be considered "the heart of VF-1".
Everything involved in fetching a gopher resource happens here:
sending the request over the network, parsing the response if
its a menu, storing the response in a temporary file, choosing
and calling a handler program, and updating the history.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient._send_request
documentation:
Send a selector to a given host and port.
Returns the resolved address and binary file with the reply.
This method below started life as the core of the old gopherlib.py
module from Python 2.4, with minimal changes made for Python 3
compatibility and to handle convenient download of plain text (including
Unicode) or binary files.  It's come a long way since then, though.
Everything network related happens in this one method!

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.default
documentation: Cmd implementation follows

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_set
documentation: View or set various options.
## Settings

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_handler
documentation: View or set handler commands for different MIME types.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_go
documentation: Go to a gopher URL or marked item.
## Stuff for getting around

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_reload
documentation: Reload the current URL.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_up
documentation: Go up one directory in the path.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_back
documentation: Go back to the previous gopher item in history.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_forward
documentation: Go forward to the next gopher item in history.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_next
documentation: Go to next item after current in lookup.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_previous
documentation: Go to previous item before current in lookup.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_root
documentation: Go to root selector of the server hosting current item.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_user
documentation: Go to top of tilde directory in current item's path.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_tour
documentation:
Add index items as waypoints on a tour, which is basically a FIFO
queue of gopher items.

Items can be added with `tour 1 2 3 4` or ranges like `tour 1-4`.
All items in current menu can be added with `tour *`.
Current tour can be listed with `tour ls` and scrubbed with `tour clear`.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_mark
documentation:
Mark the current item with a single letter.  This letter can then
be passed to the 'go' command to return to the current item later.
Think of it like marks in vi: 'mark a'='ma' and 'go a'=''a'.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_search
documentation: Submit a search query to the user-configured search engine.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_veronica
documentation: Submit a search query to the Veronica 2 search engine.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_version
documentation: Display version information.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_ls
documentation:
List contents of current index.
Use 'ls -l' to see URLs.
## Stuff that modifies the lookup table

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_history
documentation: Display history.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_filter
documentation: Filter index (case insensitive).

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.emptyline
documentation: Page through index ten lines at a time.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_cat
documentation: Run most recently visited item through "cat" command.
## Stuff that does something to most recently viewed item

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_less
documentation: Run most recently visited item through "less" command.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_fold
documentation: Run most recently visited item through "fold" command.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_shell
documentation: 'cat' most recently visited item through a shell pipeline.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_save
documentation:
Save an item to the filesystem.
'save n filename' saves menu item n to the specified filename.
'save filename' saves the last viewed item to the specified filename.
'save n' saves menu item n to an automagic filename.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_url
documentation: Print URL of most recently visited item.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_links
documentation: Extract URLs from most recently visited item.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_add
documentation:
Add the current URL to the bookmarks menu.
Optionally, specify the new name for the bookmark.
## Bookmarking stuff

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_bookmarks
documentation: Show the current bookmarks menu.

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_tls
documentation: Engage or disengage battloid mode.
## Security

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_help
documentation: ALARM! Recursion detected! ALARM! Prepare to eject!
## Help

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_blackbox
documentation:
Display contents of flight recorder, showing statistics for the
current gopher browsing session.
## Flight recorder

methods.name: vf1.GopherClient.do_quit
documentation: Exit VF-1.
## The end!
